summary: POS page redesign tested successfully - light theme and search dropdown functionality working as expected. All 7 features verified: white background, search input shows dropdown, dropdown filters as typing, clicking product adds to cart, dropdown closes after selection, cart displays correctly, total updates properly.

minor.issue: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: 404' for some static resources - likely missing favicon, non-critical

passed_tests: POS page loads with light/white background (rgb(248, 250, 252))
Search input with data-testid='pos-search-input' present and working
Dropdown appears when typing in search input
Dropdown filters products as you type more characters
Clicking on product in dropdown adds it to cart
Dropdown closes automatically after selecting a product
Cart table displays added products with name, quantity, price, total
Cart badge shows correct count (1 item)
Subtotal and Total display correctly (500.00 after adding test product)
Complete sale button present with data-testid='complete-sale-btn'
No session warning displays correctly when session not open
Product search results show name, barcode, stock, and price
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
ProductSearchDropdown component is reusable and properly documented
Click-outside handler implemented correctly to close dropdown

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All requested POS features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing test product: واقي شاشة تجريبي (barcode: 489742, price: 500.00, stock: 10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: POS page has been redesigned with: 1) Light/white theme (rgb(248,250,252) background), 2) Search dropdown replaces product grid - products now appear in a dropdown list when typing in search, 3) Dropdown filters as you type, 4) Click on product adds to cart and closes dropdown, 5) Cart displays in table format with quantity controls, 6) Total updates correctly. All data-testid attributes are in place. Session must be open to complete sales.

Light Background Theme.details: Page uses light theme with rgb(248, 250, 252) background color - white Cards on light gray

Search Dropdown.details: Typing in search input shows dropdown with filtered products

Dropdown Filtering.details: Dropdown results filter/shrink as user types more characters

Add to Cart.details: Clicking product in dropdown adds it to cart successfully

Dropdown Close.details: Dropdown automatically closes after product selection

Cart Display.details: Cart table shows product name, quantity with +/- controls, price, discount, total

Total Updates.details: Subtotal (500.00) and Total (500.00) update correctly when adding products
